caption: A person with blonde hair, wearing a black shirt, is visible in a small video overlay in the bottom-left or bottom-center of a video game interface. The interface displays a player profile for "CHIGOZIEM OKONKWO," an 89-rated "TE." The screen shows a character model wearing a blue and white football jersey with the number 85. The interface contains several menus including "HISTORY," "DESCRIPTION," and "ARCHETYPE," with the text "Vertical Threat" and "Vertical Threat - TE" listed. Navigation options on the left include "Compare," "Promote to starter," "Add to sets," "Auction," and "Trade." As the sequence progresses, the menu changes from the "HISTORY" and "DESCRIPTION" tabs to a "KEY" and "GENERAL" attributes section, revealing a grid of numerical stats such as "90," "71," and "92." Top-screen indicators show various currency values and a level of "19."
